{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Force
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] can release a ring of [[Force]] that shreds everything in its path.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
